case_title: TJIA VERA HERAWATI VS. CORIANER GOURMENT THAI RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERAWATI, TJIA VERA AS TO DEFENDANT CORIANER GOURMENT THAI RESTAURANT
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-15-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TJIA VERA HERAWATI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORIANERE GOURMENT THAI RESTAURANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERAWATI, TJIA VERA AS TO DEFENDANT CORIANER GOURMENT THAI RESTAURANT

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CORIANER GOURMENT THAI RESTAURANT
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
